item.title: Episode 31: Building a Dream Home
item.description: Episode 31 follows the building process for a dream home, focusing on construction progress and hands-on work on site. A practical look at craftsmanship, tools, and project development.

media:content.media:title: Episode 31: Building a Dream Home
media:content.media:description: Episode 31 follows the building process for a dream home, focusing on construction progress and hands-on work on site. A practical look at craftsmanship, tools, and project development.

item.title: Let's Build Strong Stairs One Step at a Time
item.description: A practical look at building strong stairs, with a focus on the process, tools, and craftsmanship behind each step. What part of the build stands out most?

media:content.media:title: Let's Build Strong Stairs One Step at a Time
media:content.media:description: A practical look at building strong stairs, with a focus on the process, tools, and craftsmanship behind each step. What part of the build stands out most?

item.title: Answering Frequently Asked Questions
item.description: A straightforward breakdown addressing the most common questions, clearing up confusion and giving simple, direct explanations. What are people asking the most?

item.title: Father’s Day Message from the Job Site
item.description: A simple Father’s Day message from the job site, shared with dads everywhere. Building work, tools, and project progress stay at the center of the day. How are you spending Father’s Day?

media:content.media:description: A simple Father’s Day message from the job site, shared with dads everywhere. Building work, tools, and project progress stay at the center of the day. How are you spending Father’s Day?

item.title: Episode 32: Another Step Toward the Dream
item.description: Episode 32 follows another step in the building process, showing steady progress on the project. A practical look at construction work and craftsmanship as the job moves forward. What comes next?

item.title: Why Knowing Building Codes Matters in Construction
item.description: A breakdown of how building codes ensure safety, compliance, and long-term durability in construction projects. What risks come from ignoring them?

media:content.media:description: A breakdown of how building codes ensure safety, compliance, and long-term durability in construction projects. What risks come from ignoring them?

item.title: Let's Talk French Drains: Nantahala #11
item.description: A discussion and demonstration of French drain systems highlights proper water management techniques for construction sites. Why is drainage so critical in builds like this?

item.title: Building comfort, style, and quality from the ground up

item.title: Building a Stairwell on a Small Income Property
item.description: A stairwell is carefully built in a compact income property, balancing space constraints with safety and functionality. How do you maximize space in tight builds?

item.title: Tool Time Triumph: 5 Tips, 5 Tools, Efficient Work
item.description: A practical breakdown of five essential tools and tips that improve speed, accuracy, and efficiency on the job site. Which tool makes the biggest difference?
